step_1.sub_title: Get started by connecting your Shopify store. TrustShop will seamlessly integrate with your shop, making it easy to manage reviews and engage with customers.
step_1.title: ✋ Welcome to TrustShop
step_1.select_language: What is your primary language of communication?
step_1.select_language_subtitle: Select your preferred language for the interface.
step_1.help_text: You can always change the primary language later in the settings.

quick_guide.step_2: Wait for automatic integration (takes about 5 seconds)
quick_guide.step_3: Click Save button (at the top-right corner) and ensure that you see a success massage appears
quick_guide.helptext:
This step adds necessary code to display reviews across your store.

Don't worry - this won't affect your store's design or layout.

step_2.title: Automatic Review Request Settings
step_2.email_setting_subtitle: Set up when and how customers receive review requests via email. Choose timing based on order status and customize by country.
step_2.help_text: You can always change this configuration later in the settings.

quick_guide.title: Add review widget
quick_guide.step_2: Add the following code to the bottom of your theme file
quick_guide.step_4: Return to this onboarding page to continue onboarding.

The widget will show customer reviews for each product.

Don't worry - this won't affect your store's design or layout.

quick_guide.title: 2. Add review widget
quick_guide.step_2: The widget will be automatically added to your product template
quick_guide.step_4: Check your product page to see the reviews in action
quick_guide.step_5: Return to this onboarding page to continue onboarding
quick_guide.helptext:
The widget will show customer reviews for each product.
